title: thelypteris obliterata
intro: Thelypteris obliterata is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae, native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris obliterata include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by drying and powdering the leaves, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or topical applications.
